codeReview.summary: The feature is operational (no code delta in this run) and the reviewed commit contains Drizzle schema definitions matching the required users/recipes/pantry_items structures. Transcript and handoff evidence show `npx drizzle-kit push` succeeded and follow-up SELECT/information_schema checks were executed against all three tables.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission guidance still instructs `npx next lint`, but the repository service command uses `npx eslint .` and the worker hit the known `next lint` incompatibility. This mismatch creates avoidable validator noise.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /root/.factory/missions/1417e725-972e-4dd0-a683-c2965f2f6b3f/AGENTS.md:62 (`Run lint: npx next lint`) vs /root/try-fac/try-fac/.factory/services.yaml:7 (`lint: npx eslint .`), plus handoff.discoveredIssues for this feature.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The fullstack-worker skill procedure is too rigid for operational DB-only features (mandatory TDD/manual-browser sections), and this run surfaced that mismatch explicitly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /root/try-fac/try-fac/.factory/skills/fullstack-worker/SKILL.md:28 (Write Tests First), :63 (Manual Verification with agent-browser), and handoff.skillFeedback.suggestedChanges requesting an operational-feature exception.

summary: Reviewed db-schema-push as a pass: required schema objects are present in the committed Drizzle definitions and execution evidence shows successful push plus table/query verification. No high-confidence correctness defects were found in-scope; noted shared-state documentation/skill-procedure alignment gaps.
